prompt: Remove the watermark from the image. Then, Make the stroke of those two stickmen a bit thicker, and add a speech bubble to wrap the text.
remarks: 1.png source: Disney/Marvel; 2.png source: xkcd's What If?
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Remove the 'what if?' watermark and dinosaur logo located in the bottom-left corner. Thicken the stroke of the two stick figure characters on the right side of the image. Add a speech bubble around the text "1 FLOOR DONE, ONLY 999,999,999 TO GO.", ensuring the bubble originates from the rightmost stick figure.
objects: Building structure with windows and scaffolding
Hard hat on left stick figure
Hard hat on right stick figure
Clipboard held by right stick figure
Speech bubble containing the text "1 FLOOR DONE, ONLY 999,999,999 TO GO.", originating from the rightmost stick figure
